description: Create a ProjectLibre project for a residential solar panel installation. The project must include the following tasks and durations: Site Assessment (2 days), Permit Application (5 days), Equipment Procurement (10 days), Panel Installation (4 days), Electrical Wiring (2 days), and Final Inspection (1 day). Establish Finish-to-Start dependencies where Permit Application and Equipment Procurement follow Site Assessment; Panel Installation follows both Permit Application and Equipment Procurement; Electrical Wiring follows Panel Installation; and Final Inspection follows Electrical Wiring. Export the project as an XML file to /home/ga/Projects/solar_installation.xml.
